classification_rationale: The exploit uses basic flashloan + swap to acquire SURGE tokens, then exploits a lifecycle-hook reentrancy: xSurge sell() sends BNB before updating balances, allowing re-entry into sell() during the BNB callback. Basic actions (flashloan, swap, sell) are combined with the lifecycle-hook reentrancy window in the sell() execution path. The lifecycle-hook is a non-basic mechanism element that amplifies the sell action into a double-drain.
